revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{mbox | type = notice | text = If the park is a natural protected area [[IUCN protected area categories|listed by IUCN]], then editors should use {{tl|Infobox protected area}}. }} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Coordinates|Module:Check for unknown parameters|Module:Infobox mapframe}} This Infobox template can be used in articles about parks, gardens and nature reserves. ==Usage== {{Parameter names example |_template=Infobox park | name | alt_name | native_name | native_name_lang | image | image_size | image_alt | image_caption | map_image | map_alt | map_width | map_caption | type | motto | location | nearest_city = {{br list |{{{nearest_city}}} |''or'' {{{nearest_town}}} }} | grid_ref_UK | grid_ref_UK_note | grid_ref_Ireland | grid_ref_Ireland_note | coordinates | coords_ref | area | elevation | authorized = {{br list |{{{authorized}}} |''or'' {{{created}}} |''or'' {{{established}}} |''or'' {{{designated}}} |''or'' {{{opened}}} |''or'' {{{opening}}} }} | closed | founder | designer | etymology | owner | administrator = {{br list |{{{administrator}}} |''or'' {{{manager}}} |''or'' {{{operator}}} }} | visitation_num | visitation_year | visitation_ref | open | status | awards | camp_sites | hiking_trails = {{br list |{{{hiking_trails}}} |''or'' {{{paths}}} }} | terrain = {{br list |{{{terrain}}} |''or'' {{{habitat}}} }} | water | plants = {{br list |{{{plants}}} |''or'' {{{vegetation}}} }} | species | collections | designation | disturbance | budget | parking | publictransit = {{br list |{{{publictransit}}} |''or'' {{{transport}}} }} | free_label | free_data | other_info = {{br list |{{{other_info}}} |''or'' {{{facilities}}} }} | website | embedded }} This template provides many options. A very functional infobox can be created using the most commonly used parameters below. {| class="wikitable" ! Common parameters ! All parameters |- style="vertical-align:top;" | {{Infobox park | name = | image = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | map = | map_width = | type = | location = | nearest_city = | coordinates = | area = | created = | operator = | visitation_num = | status = | designation = | open = }} | {{Infobox park | name = | alt_name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | qid = | map = | map_alt = | map_width = | mapframe-zoom = | mapframe-width = | mapframe-height = | mapframe-marker = | mapframe-marker-color = | mapframe-lat = | mapframe-long = | map_caption = | relief = | label = | label_position = | mark = | mark_width = | type = | motto = | location = | nearest_city = | nearest_town = | grid_ref_UK = | grid_ref_UK_note = | grid_ref_Ireland = | grid_ref_Ireland_note = | coordinates = | coords_ref = | area = | elevation = | authorized = | created = | established = | designated = | opened = | opening = | closed = | founder = | designer = | etymology = | owner = | administrator = | manager = | operator = | visitation_num = | visitation_year = | visitation_ref = | open = | status = | awards = | camp_sites = | hiking_trails = | paths = | terrain = | habitat = | water = | plants = | vegetation = | species = | collections = | designation = | disturbance = | budget = | parking = | publictransit = | transport = | free_label = | free_data = | other_info = | facilities = | website = | embedded = | child = }} |} {{clear}} ==Parameters== ===Descriptions=== This table describes all parameters which can be used in build park infobox. Only the name parameter must be assigned a value. {| class="wikitable" style="width: 97%;" ! style="width: 14%" | Field name || Description |- | name || Required. The name of the park. It will be displayed at the top of the infobox. In most cases this should be the same as the article name less any disambiguation. For example, if the article title is [[Hyde Park, London]] then name=Hyde Park. |- | alt_name || If there is a common English name for the park use it for the name parameter. This parameter can be used to display the full name if different from name or for an alternate English name if it is commonly used. If you would like to italicize the text use wiki markup. |- | native_name || name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|plainlist}}. |- | native_name_lang || ISO 639-2 code e.g. "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead. |- | image
photo || The name of an image file to be displayed. No special formatting is needed. |- | image_size
photo_width || Can be used to change the display width of the image. The default width is 250 [[:en:Pixel|Pixel]]s and maximum is 325 pixels. Images with a horizontal orientation (landscape mode) will generally display well at the default setting. An image with vertical orientation (portrait mode) may need to be adjusted to 180 pixels or less. For example, image_size=200 and not image_size=200px. This template allows image_size=frameless. See [[#Photo display parameters|Photo display parameters]] below. |- | image_alt
photo_alt || Alternative text for the image, for visually impaired readers. See [[WP:ALT]]. |- | image_caption
photo_caption || The caption that will appear below the image if one is required. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Map related parameters |- | map || The name of the [[Template:location map|location map]] to be displayed. See [[#Map display methods|Map display methods]] below. To use a static image, use {{para|map_image}} |- | map_image || The file name of a static map image to be displayed. To use a [[Template:location map|location map]], use {{para|map}}. |- | map_width || Can change the display width the map. The default width is 250 pixels and maximum is 272 pixels, but usually the map can be smaller. For example, map_width=200 and not map_width=200px. |- | map_alt || Alt text for the map. See [[WP:ALT]]. |- | map_caption || The caption that appears below the map if one is required. |- | label || A text message that will be displayed next to the mark. Works with label_position below. Seldom used. |- | label_position || Specifies the position of a label with respect to the mark. This is not functional when using the pixel coordinates method for map display. Valid values are left, right, top and bottom. See label above. |- | relief || Selects a relief map when assigned any value. This is not functional when using the pixel coordinates method for map display. See [[#Map display methods|Map display methods]]. |- | mark || The image used for the mark on a map. The default is [[:File:Red pog.svg|Red pog.svg]]. See [[Template:Location map/marks|Location map/marks]] for other images. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Type, Location, Motto, Nearest city |- | type || |- | location || The location of the park. Don't be too precise. County, state and country are good in the USA. If the park is within a city specify the city, state and country. If the park is in multiple counties just list the state and country. For areas in other countries adjust accordingly. |- | motto || |- | nearest_city
nearest_town || Recommended if the area is not within a city or town. It could be a city with a major airport or a large gateway town where supplies and lodging are available. Use the most appropriate parameter. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Coordinates-related parameters |- | grid_ref_UK || If the park is in Great Britain, the British grid reference. For parks outside of Great Britain, this field is not applicable and therefore should be removed if it is present. |- | grid_ref_UK_note || If grid_ref_UK is used, this will add a note (e.g., for a reference) immediately after. |- | grid_ref_Ireland || If the park is in Ireland (whether Northern Ireland or the Republic), the Irish grid reference. For parks outside Ireland, this field is not applicable and therefore should be removed if it is present. |- | grid_ref_UK_Ireland || If grid_ref_Ireland is used, this will add a note (e.g., for a reference) immediately after. |- | coordinates || For the {{tl|coord}} template. The parameters {{para|format|dms}} and {{para|display|inline,title}} are recommended. Its coordinates can be used with the location map. (Unless a value for type: is provided, the template will automatically use type:landmark. See the {{tl|Coord}} page for more info.) |- | coords_ref || Strongly recommended. Specify a citation for the coordinates using {{nowrap| ...}} tags. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Other parameters |- | area || Area of the protected park. Usually in acres or square miles for US locations and hectares or square kilometres elsewhere. The {{tl|convert}} template should be used. Very small areas might be specified in square feet, square yards or square metres. |- | elevation || Elevation of the park if it is noteworthy. The {{tl|convert}} template should be used. |- | authorized
created
established
designated
opened
opening || The date the park was created. See [[#Alternate parameters|below]]. Use {{tl|start date}}. For example, for Yosemite National Park, use {{start date|1890|10|1}}. |- | closed || The date of closure or disestablishment, if applicable. |- | founder || The person who founded the park or garden. |- | designer || The person who designed the park or garden. |- | etymology || The [[:en:Etymology|Etymology]] of parks name. Should be very brief or only included in the text of the article. |- | owner || |- | administrator
manager
operator || The agency or organization which controls or owns the park. See [[#Alternate parameters|below]]. |- | visitation_num || The number of visitors in a recent year if known. |- | visitation_year || The year during which the number of visitors was counted. |- | visitation_ref || Used with the visitation parameters above. Highly recommended. Specify the a citation for the visitation data using {{nowrap| ...}} tags. |- | open || The hours, days, or months that the park is open. |- | status || The status of the park. ''e.g.'' "Closed for restoration", or "Closed due to budgetary considerations." Sometimes used as an alternative to open. ''e.g.'' "Open all year." |- | awards || Any awards given to the park; for example, [[Green Flag Award]] in the UK. |- | camp_sites || |- | hiking_trails
paths || |- | terrain
habitat || Type(s) of terrain or habitat(s). |- | water || |- | plants
vegetation || Number of individual plants grown. |- | species || Number of species grown. |- | collections || Notable plant collections. |- | designation || The legal protection offered to the park. |- | disturbance || Threats to the park, e.g. logging, urban development. |- | budget || Owner/ operator's planned annual expenditure. |- | parking || Information on the park's parking facilities (e.g. number of spaces or lots). |- | publictransit
transport || The nearest public transport stop. |- | free_label || Customisable label. |- | free_data || Data field used with free_label. |- | other_info
facilities || |- | website || Website. Use {{tl|URL}}. |- | embedded || Used to embed another template in this one. See [[#Template embedding|below]]. |- | child || Used to embed this template in another. See [[#Template embedding|below]]. |} ===Image display parameters=== The parameters image_size or photo_width allow several options: {| class="wikitable" style="width: 97%;" ! Option || Description |- | image_size=
photo_width= || If no value is assigned, the image will display with a width of 250 pixels. |- | image_size=
photo_width= || Where n is any numeric value, the image will display with a width of n pixels. The maximum width is 325 pixels. |- | image_size=frameless
photo_width=frameless || The image will display with a default width of 220 pixels, however, if a user is logged in, they can change this value [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|here]]. If this option is used, the upright parameter is made available. For example, |image_size=frameless|upright=1.2 will cause the image to display with a width of (220 * 1.2) or 264 pixels. More information about this parameter can be found [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Plain picture sizes|here]]. |- | image_size=upright
photo_width=upright || The image will display with a default width of 170px. This is equivalent to {{nowrap|[[File:Example.jpg|frameless|upright]]}} using wiki image syntax. More information about the upright option can be found [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Upright images|here]]. |} === Alternate parameters === A few cells allow alternate parameter names which can be used to generate an appropriate label. Editors should probably not be overly concerned with using the correct label unless using the wrong label would be a blatant error. Nearest city or town: : nearest_city → Nearest city : nearest_town → Nearest town To display the date the park was ''created'' use the most appropriate parameter below: : authorized → Authorized : created → Created : designated → Designated : established → Established : opened → Opened : opening → Opening To display the name of the entity which ''manages'' the park use the most appropriate parameter below: : administrator → Administered by : manager → Managed by : operator → Operated by Hiking trails or paths: : hiking_trails → Hiking trails : paths → Paths Terrain or habitat: : terrain → Terrain : habitat → Habitats Plants or vegetation: : plants → Plants : vegetation → Vegetation Public transit access or connecting transport: : publictransit → Public transit access : transport → Connecting transport Other information or facilities: : other_info → Other information : facilities → Facilities ==Examples== {{Infobox park|qid=Q7683479 | name = Tank Hill Park | alt_name = | image = Tank Hill, San Francisco.jpg | image_size = 256 | image_alt = | image_caption = Tank Hill from below | type = Municipal Park and Natural Area | location = [[San Francisco, California]], U.S. | coordinates = {{coord|37|45|36|N|122|26|51|W|region:US-CA_source:gnis|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|2.87|acre|2}} | created = {{start date|1977}} | operator = San Francisco Recreation and Parks }} {{Infobox park | name = Tank Hill Park | alt_name = | image = Tank Hill, San Francisco.jpg | image_size = 256 | image_alt = | image_caption = Tank Hill from below | type = Municipal Park and Natural Area | location = [[San Francisco]], [[California]] | coordinates = {{coord|37|45|36|N|122|26|51|W|region:US-CA_source:gnis|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|2.87|acre|2}} | created = {{start date|1977}} | operator = San Francisco Recreation and Parks }} {{clear}} {{Infobox park | name = Edworthy Park | image = Calgary-Edworthy Park.JPG | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = Bow River seen from Edworthy Park | map = Canada Calgary | map_width = 192 | map_alt = | map_caption = Location of Edworthy Park in Calgary | type = [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]] | location = [[:en:Calgary, Alberta|Calgary, Alberta]], Canada | coordinates = {{coord|51|03|41|N|114|09|23|W|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|1.27|km2|abbr=on|2}} | operator = [[:en:Calgary|City of Calgary]] | open = All year }} {{Infobox park | name = Edworthy Park | image = Calgary-Edworthy Park.JPG | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = Bow River seen from Edworthy Park | map = Canada Calgary | map_width = 192 | map_alt = | map_caption = Location of Edworthy Park in Calgary | type = [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]] | location = [[:en:Calgary, Alberta|Calgary, Alberta]], Canada | coordinates = {{coord|51|03|41|N|114|09|23|W|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|1.27|km2|abbr=on|2}} | operator = [[:en:Calgary|City of Calgary]] | open = All year }} {{clear}} == Map display methods == Any image of a map showing the location of the park can be used. === Display a marker on a map using a template and geographic coordinates === A marker can be superimposed on a map using one of a set of special map templates. To display a marker, the geographic coordinates must be specified using the {{tl|Coord}} template inside the {{para|coordinates}} parameter. See the documentation for {{tl|Location map}}. The parameters for this template map to a subset of the parameters used by {{tlf|Location map}}. A map template can be found using these sources: :[[:en:Template:Location map/List|List of templates]] – Many of the listed items are redirects and a few templates may not function as expected. :[[:Category:Location map templates]] - templates sorted by category. :[[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Location map/Info]] – a search that might help. :[[Special:PrefixIndex/Module:Location map/data/]] – another search that might help. :[[Special:Prefixindex/Template:Location map]] – another search that might help. All of the names begin with the words "Location map" followed by the area covered. The value you need to specify is the area name. The map template for Canada is [[Module:Location map/data/Canada|Location map/data/Canada]]. In this case specify {{para|map|Canada}}. {{Infobox park| | name = Four Corners, Canada | map = Canada | map_caption = Example using geographic coordinates | coordinates = {{coord|60|N|102|W|display=inline }} }} {{Infobox park| | name = Four Corners, Canada | map = Canada | map_caption = Example using geographic coordinates | coordinates = {{coord|60|N|102|W|display=inline }} }} By default, {{tl|Coord}} displays in the infobox only in the page title. Parameter {{para|display|inline,title}} can be added to make the coordinates display at the top of the page as well. {{clear}} === Mapframe parameters === {{Infobox mapframe/doc/parameters |mapframe={{kbd|no}} if a pushpin map or map image is specified, {{kbd|yes}} otherwise |mapframe-frame-width=250 |mapframe-marker=park }} == Template embedding == This template can be embedding in another infobox template by adding the code |child=yes. To embed another template in this one use |embedded={{Infobox .... == Microformat == The articles created using this template include an hCard microformat. For more information read [[:Template:UF-hcard-place|this]]. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}}
{ "description": "A template for displaying information related to parks and gardens.", "params": { "name": { "label": "Name", "type": "string", "description": "The name of the park. In most cases this should be the same as the article name less any disambiguation.", "example": "Hyde Park", "suggested": true }, "alt_name": { "label": "Alternate name", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "This parameter can be used to display the full name if different from 'name' or for an alternate English name if it is commonly used" }, "native_name": { "label": "Native name", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{plainlist}}." }, "native_name_lang": { "label": "Native name language", "type": "line", "required": false, "description": "ISO 639-2 code", "example": "fr" }, "image": { "label": "Image", "type": "wiki-file-name", "suggested": true, "description": "The name of an image file to be displayed.", "aliases": [ "photo" ] }, "image_size": { "label": "Image size", "type": "line", "required": false, "description": "Can be used to change the display width of the image", "example": "300px", "default": "250px", "aliases": [ "photo_width" ] }, "image_alt": { "label": "Image alternate text", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Alternative text for the image, for visually impaired readers.", "aliases": [ "photo_alt" ] }, "image_caption": { "label": "Image caption", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The caption that will appear below the image.", "aliases": [ "photo_caption" ] }, "map": { "label": "Map", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The name of the location map to be displayed." }, "map_image": { "label": "Map image", "type": "wiki-page-name", "required": false, "description": "The file name of a static map image to be displayed." }, "map_width": { "label": "Map width", "type": "line", "required": false, "description": "Can change the display width the map.", "default": "250px" }, "map_alt": { "label": "Map alternate text", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Alt text for the map." }, "map_caption": { "label": "Map caption", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The caption that appears below the map." }, "label": { "label": "Label", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "A text message that will be displayed next to the mark." }, "label_position": { "label": "Label position", "type": "line", "required": false, "description": "Specifies the position of a label with respect to the mark. Valid values are left, right, top and bottom." }, "relief": { "label": "Relief", "type": "line", "required": false, "description": "Selects a relief map when assigned any value." }, "mark": { "label": "Mark", "type": "wiki-page-name", "required": false, "description": "The image used for the mark on a map." }, "type": { "label": "Type", "type": "string", "suggested": true, "description": "Type of park." }, "location": { "label": "Location", "type": "string", "suggested": true, "description": "The location of the park. Don't be too precise." }, "motto": { "label": "Motto", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Official motto of the park." }, "nearest_city": { "label": "Nearest city", "type": "wiki-page-name", "required": false, "description": "Recommended if the area is not within a city or town." }, "nearest_town": { "label": "Nearest town", "type": "wiki-page-name", "required": false, "description": "Recommended if the area is not within a city or town." }, "grid_ref_UK": { "label": "Grid reference UK", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "If the park is in Great Britain, the British grid reference." }, "grid_ref_UK_note": { "label": "Note for UK grid reference", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Supporting reference for British OS grid ref" }, "grid_ref_Ireland": { "label": "Grid reference Ireland", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "If the park is in Ireland (whether Northern Ireland or the Republic), the Irish grid reference." }, "grid_ref_Ireland_note": { "label": "Note for Ireland grid reference", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Supporting reference for Irish OS grid ref" }, "coordinates": { "label": "Coordinates", "type": "string", "suggested": true, "description": "For the {{coord}} template." }, "coords_ref": { "label": "Coordinates reference", "type": "string", "suggested": true, "description": "Strongly recommended. Specify a citation for the coordinates." }, "area": { "label": "Area", "type": "string", "suggested": true, "description": "Area of the protected park. Usually in acres or square miles for US locations and hectares or square kilometres elsewhere. The {{convert}} template should be used." }, "elevation": { "label": "Elevation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Elevation of the park if it is noteworthy." }, "authorized": { "label": "Authorized", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the park was created. Use {{start date}}." }, "created": { "label": "Created", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the park was created. Use {{start date}}." }, "established": { "label": "Established", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the park was created. Use {{start date}}." }, "designated": { "label": "Designated", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the park was created. Use {{start date}}." }, "opened": { "label": "Opened", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the park was created. Use {{start date}}." }, "opening": { "label": "Opening", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date the park was created. Use {{start date}}." }, "closed": { "label": "Closed", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The date of closure or disestablishment." }, "founder": { "label": "Founder", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The person who founded the park or garden." }, "designer": { "label": "Designer", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The person who designed the park or garden." }, "etymology": { "label": "Etymology", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The etymology of parks name." }, "owner": { "label": "Owner", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The owner of the park." }, "administrator": { "label": "Administrator", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The agency or organization which controls or owns the park." }, "manager": { "label": "Manager", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The agency or organization which controls or owns the park." }, "operator": { "label": "Operator", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The agency or organization which controls or owns the park." }, "visitation_num": { "label": "Visitation number", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The number of visitors in a recent year if known." }, "visitation_year": { "label": "Visitation year", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The year during which the number of visitors was counted." }, "visitation_ref": { "label": "Visitation reference", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Specify a citation for the visitation data." }, "open": { "label": "Open", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The hours, days, or months that the park is open." }, "status": { "label": "Status", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The status of the park.", "example": "Closed for restoration" }, "awards": { "label": "Awards", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Any awards given to the park." }, "camp_sites": { "label": "Camp sites", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Any campsites within the park." }, "hiking_trails": { "label": "Hiking trails", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Any hiking trails within the park." }, "paths": { "label": "Paths", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Any hiking paths within the park." }, "terrain": { "label": "Terrain", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Type(s) of terrain or habitat(s)." }, "habitat": { "label": "Habitat", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Type(s) of terrain or habitat(s)." }, "water": { "label": "Water", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Bodies of water within the park." }, "plants": { "label": "Plants", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Number of individual plants grown." }, "vegetation": { "label": "Vegetation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Number of individual plants grown." }, "species": { "label": "Species", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Number of species grown." }, "collections": { "label": "Collections", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Notable plant collections." }, "designation": { "label": "Designation", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The legal protection offered to the park." }, "disturbance": { "label": "Disturbance", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Threats to the park.", "example": "Logging" }, "budget": { "label": "Budget", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Owner/ operator's planned annual expenditure." }, "parking": { "label": "Parking", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Information on the park's parking facilities." }, "publictransit": { "label": "Public transit", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The nearest public transport stop." }, "transport": { "label": "Transport", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "The nearest public transport stop." }, "free_label": { "label": "Free label", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Customisable label." }, "free_data": { "label": "Free data", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Data field used with free_label." }, "other_info": { "label": "Other info", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Miscellaneous information." }, "facilities": { "label": "Facilities", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Miscellaneous information." }, "website": { "label": "Website", "type": "string", "suggested": true, "description": "Website. Use {{URL}}." }, "embedded": { "label": "Embedded", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Used to embed another template in this one." }, "child": { "label": "Child", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Used to embed this template in another." } }, "format": "block", "paramOrder": [ "name", "alt_name", "native_name", "native_name_lang", "image", "image_size", "image_alt", "image_caption", "map", "map_image", "map_width", "map_alt", "map_caption", "label", "label_position", "relief", "mark", "type", "location", "motto", "nearest_city", "nearest_town", "grid_ref_UK", "grid_ref_UK_note", "grid_ref_Ireland", "grid_ref_Ireland_note", "coordinates", "coords_ref", "area", "elevation", "authorized", "created", "established", "designated", "opened", "opening", "closed", "founder", "designer", "etymology", "owner", "administrator", "manager", "operator", "visitation_num", "visitation_year", "visitation_ref", "open", "status", "awards", "camp_sites", "hiking_trails", "paths", "terrain", "habitat", "water", "plants", "vegetation", "species", "collections", "designation", "disturbance", "budget", "parking", "publictransit", "transport", "free_label", "free_data", "other_info", "facilities", "website", "embedded", "child" ] }
{{collapse bottom}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox park with unknown parameters}} ==See also== * {{tl|Infobox street}} * {{tl|Infobox urban feature}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Place infobox templates|Park]] [[Category:Protected areas templates|Park infobox]] [[Category:Templates with coordinates fields]] [[Category:Embeddable templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{mbox | type = notice | text = If the park is a natural protected area [[IUCN protected area categories|listed by IUCN]], then editors should use {{tl|Infobox protected area}}. }} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Coordinates|Module:Check for unknown parameters|Module:Infobox mapframe}} This Infobox template can be used in articles about parks, gardens and nature reserves. ==Usage== {{Parameter names example |_template=Infobox park | name | alt_name | native_name | native_name_lang | image | image_size | image_alt | image_caption | map_image | map_alt | map_width | map_caption | type | motto | location | nearest_city = {{br list |{{{nearest_city}}} |''or'' {{{nearest_town}}} }} | grid_ref_UK | grid_ref_UK_note | grid_ref_Ireland | grid_ref_Ireland_note | coordinates | coords_ref | area | elevation | authorized = {{br list |{{{authorized}}} |''or'' {{{created}}} |''or'' {{{established}}} |''or'' {{{designated}}} |''or'' {{{opened}}} |''or'' {{{opening}}} }} | closed | founder | designer | etymology | owner | administrator = {{br list |{{{administrator}}} |''or'' {{{manager}}} |''or'' {{{operator}}} }} | visitation_num | visitation_year | visitation_ref | open | status | awards | camp_sites | hiking_trails = {{br list |{{{hiking_trails}}} |''or'' {{{paths}}} }} | terrain = {{br list |{{{terrain}}} |''or'' {{{habitat}}} }} | water | plants = {{br list |{{{plants}}} |''or'' {{{vegetation}}} }} | species | collections | designation | disturbance | budget | parking | publictransit = {{br list |{{{publictransit}}} |''or'' {{{transport}}} }} | free_label | free_data | other_info = {{br list |{{{other_info}}} |''or'' {{{facilities}}} }} | website | embedded }} This template provides many options. A very functional infobox can be created using the most commonly used parameters below. {| class="wikitable" ! Common parameters ! All parameters |- style="vertical-align:top;" | {{Infobox park | name = | image = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | map = | map_width = | type = | location = | nearest_city = | coordinates = | area = | created = | operator = | visitation_num = | status = | designation = | open = }} | {{Infobox park | name = | alt_name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | qid = | map = | map_alt = | map_width = | mapframe-zoom = | mapframe-width = | mapframe-height = | mapframe-marker = | mapframe-marker-color = | mapframe-lat = | mapframe-long = | map_caption = | relief = | label = | label_position = | mark = | mark_width = | type = | motto = | location = | nearest_city = | nearest_town = | grid_ref_UK = | grid_ref_UK_note = | grid_ref_Ireland = | grid_ref_Ireland_note = | coordinates = | coords_ref = | area = | elevation = | authorized = | created = | established = | designated = | opened = | opening = | closed = | founder = | designer = | etymology = | owner = | administrator = | manager = | operator = | visitation_num = | visitation_year = | visitation_ref = | open = | status = | awards = | camp_sites = | hiking_trails = | paths = | terrain = | habitat = | water = | plants = | vegetation = | species = | collections = | designation = | disturbance = | budget = | parking = | publictransit = | transport = | free_label = | free_data = | other_info = | facilities = | website = | embedded = | child = }} |} {{clear}} ==Parameters== ===Descriptions=== This table describes all parameters which can be used in build park infobox. Only the name parameter must be assigned a value. {| class="wikitable" style="width: 97%;" ! style="width: 14%" | Field name || Description |- | name || Required. The name of the park. It will be displayed at the top of the infobox. In most cases this should be the same as the article name less any disambiguation. For example, if the article title is [[Hyde Park, London]] then name=Hyde Park. |- | alt_name || If there is a common English name for the park use it for the name parameter. This parameter can be used to display the full name if different from name or for an alternate English name if it is commonly used. If you would like to italicize the text use wiki markup. |- | native_name || name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|plainlist}}. |- | native_name_lang || ISO 639-2 code e.g. "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead. |- | image
photo || The name of an image file to be displayed. No special formatting is needed. |- | image_size
photo_width || Can be used to change the display width of the image. The default width is 250 [[:en:Pixel|Pixel]]s and maximum is 325 pixels. Images with a horizontal orientation (landscape mode) will generally display well at the default setting. An image with vertical orientation (portrait mode) may need to be adjusted to 180 pixels or less. For example, image_size=200 and not image_size=200px. This template allows image_size=frameless. See [[#Photo display parameters|Photo display parameters]] below. |- | image_alt
photo_alt || Alternative text for the image, for visually impaired readers. See [[WP:ALT]]. |- | image_caption
photo_caption || The caption that will appear below the image if one is required. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Map related parameters |- | map || The name of the [[Template:location map|location map]] to be displayed. See [[#Map display methods|Map display methods]] below. To use a static image, use {{para|map_image}} |- | map_image || The file name of a static map image to be displayed. To use a [[Template:location map|location map]], use {{para|map}}. |- | map_width || Can change the display width the map. The default width is 250 pixels and maximum is 272 pixels, but usually the map can be smaller. For example, map_width=200 and not map_width=200px. |- | map_alt || Alt text for the map. See [[WP:ALT]]. |- | map_caption || The caption that appears below the map if one is required. |- | label || A text message that will be displayed next to the mark. Works with label_position below. Seldom used. |- | label_position || Specifies the position of a label with respect to the mark. This is not functional when using the pixel coordinates method for map display. Valid values are left, right, top and bottom. See label above. |- | relief || Selects a relief map when assigned any value. This is not functional when using the pixel coordinates method for map display. See [[#Map display methods|Map display methods]]. |- | mark || The image used for the mark on a map. The default is [[:File:Red pog.svg|Red pog.svg]]. See [[Template:Location map/marks|Location map/marks]] for other images. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Type, Location, Motto, Nearest city |- | type || |- | location || The location of the park. Don't be too precise. County, state and country are good in the USA. If the park is within a city specify the city, state and country. If the park is in multiple counties just list the state and country. For areas in other countries adjust accordingly. |- | motto || |- | nearest_city
nearest_town || Recommended if the area is not within a city or town. It could be a city with a major airport or a large gateway town where supplies and lodging are available. Use the most appropriate parameter. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Coordinates-related parameters |- | grid_ref_UK || If the park is in Great Britain, the British grid reference. For parks outside of Great Britain, this field is not applicable and therefore should be removed if it is present. |- | grid_ref_UK_note || If grid_ref_UK is used, this will add a note (e.g., for a reference) immediately after. |- | grid_ref_Ireland || If the park is in Ireland (whether Northern Ireland or the Republic), the Irish grid reference. For parks outside Ireland, this field is not applicable and therefore should be removed if it is present. |- | grid_ref_UK_Ireland || If grid_ref_Ireland is used, this will add a note (e.g., for a reference) immediately after. |- | coordinates || For the {{tl|coord}} template. The parameters {{para|format|dms}} and {{para|display|inline,title}} are recommended. Its coordinates can be used with the location map. (Unless a value for type: is provided, the template will automatically use type:landmark. See the {{tl|Coord}} page for more info.) |- | coords_ref || Strongly recommended. Specify a citation for the coordinates using {{nowrap| ...}} tags. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Other parameters |- | area || Area of the protected park. Usually in acres or square miles for US locations and hectares or square kilometres elsewhere. The {{tl|convert}} template should be used. Very small areas might be specified in square feet, square yards or square metres. |- | elevation || Elevation of the park if it is noteworthy. The {{tl|convert}} template should be used. |- | authorized
created
established
designated
opened
opening || The date the park was created. See [[#Alternate parameters|below]]. Use {{tl|start date}}. For example, for Yosemite National Park, use {{start date|1890|10|1}}. |- | closed || The date of closure or disestablishment, if applicable. |- | founder || The person who founded the park or garden. |- | designer || The person who designed the park or garden. |- | etymology || The [[:en:Etymology|Etymology]] of parks name. Should be very brief or only included in the text of the article. |- | owner || |- | administrator
manager
operator || The agency or organization which controls or owns the park. See [[#Alternate parameters|below]]. |- | visitation_num || The number of visitors in a recent year if known. |- | visitation_year || The year during which the number of visitors was counted. |- | visitation_ref || Used with the visitation parameters above. Highly recommended. Specify the a citation for the visitation data using {{nowrap| ...}} tags. |- | open || The hours, days, or months that the park is open. |- | status || The status of the park. ''e.g.'' "Closed for restoration", or "Closed due to budgetary considerations." Sometimes used as an alternative to open. ''e.g.'' "Open all year." |- | awards || Any awards given to the park; for example, [[Green Flag Award]] in the UK. |- | camp_sites || |- | hiking_trails
paths || |- | terrain
habitat || Type(s) of terrain or habitat(s). |- | water || |- | plants
vegetation || Number of individual plants grown. |- | species || Number of species grown. |- | collections || Notable plant collections. |- | designation || The legal protection offered to the park. |- | disturbance || Threats to the park, e.g. logging, urban development. |- | budget || Owner/ operator's planned annual expenditure. |- | parking || Information on the park's parking facilities (e.g. number of spaces or lots). |- | publictransit
transport || The nearest public transport stop. |- | free_label || Customisable label. |- | free_data || Data field used with free_label. |- | other_info
facilities || |- | website || Website. Use {{tl|URL}}. |- | embedded || Used to embed another template in this one. See [[#Template embedding|below]]. |- | child || Used to embed this template in another. See [[#Template embedding|below]]. |} ===Image display parameters=== The parameters image_size or photo_width allow several options: {| class="wikitable" style="width: 97%;" ! Option || Description |- | image_size=
photo_width= || If no value is assigned, the image will display with a width of 250 pixels. |- | image_size=
photo_width= || Where n is any numeric value, the image will display with a width of n pixels. The maximum width is 325 pixels. |- | image_size=frameless
photo_width=frameless || The image will display with a default width of 220 pixels, however, if a user is logged in, they can change this value [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|here]]. If this option is used, the upright parameter is made available. For example, |image_size=frameless|upright=1.2 will cause the image to display with a width of (220 * 1.2) or 264 pixels. More information about this parameter can be found [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Plain picture sizes|here]]. |- | image_size=upright
photo_width=upright || The image will display with a default width of 170px. This is equivalent to {{nowrap|[[File:Example.jpg|frameless|upright]]}} using wiki image syntax. More information about the upright option can be found [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Upright images|here]]. |} === Alternate parameters === A few cells allow alternate parameter names which can be used to generate an appropriate label. Editors should probably not be overly concerned with using the correct label unless using the wrong label would be a blatant error. Nearest city or town: : nearest_city → Nearest city : nearest_town → Nearest town To display the date the park was ''created'' use the most appropriate parameter below: : authorized → Authorized : created → Created : designated → Designated : established → Established : opened → Opened : opening → Opening To display the name of the entity which ''manages'' the park use the most appropriate parameter below: : administrator → Administered by : manager → Managed by : operator → Operated by Hiking trails or paths: : hiking_trails → Hiking trails : paths → Paths Terrain or habitat: : terrain → Terrain : habitat → Habitats Plants or vegetation: : plants → Plants : vegetation → Vegetation Public transit access or connecting transport: : publictransit → Public transit access : transport → Connecting transport Other information or facilities: : other_info → Other information : facilities → Facilities ==Examples== {{Infobox park|qid=Q7683479 | name = Tank Hill Park | alt_name = | image = Tank Hill, San Francisco.jpg | image_size = 256 | image_alt = | image_caption = Tank Hill from below | type = Municipal Park and Natural Area | location = [[:en:San Francisco, California|San Francisco, California]], U.S. | coordinates = {{coord|37|45|36|N|122|26|51|W|region:US-CA_source:gnis|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|2.87|acre|2}} | created = {{start date|1977}} | operator = San Francisco Recreation and Parks }} {{Infobox park | name = Tank Hill Park | alt_name = | image = Tank Hill, San Francisco.jpg | image_size = 256 | image_alt = | image_caption = Tank Hill from below | type = Municipal Park and Natural Area | location = [[San Francisco]], [[California]] | coordinates = {{coord|37|45|36|N|122|26|51|W|region:US-CA_source:gnis|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|2.87|acre|2}} | created = {{start date|1977}} | operator = San Francisco Recreation and Parks }} {{clear}} {{Infobox park | name = Edworthy Park | image = Calgary-Edworthy Park.JPG | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = Bow River seen from Edworthy Park | map = Canada Calgary | map_width = 192 | map_alt = | map_caption = Location of Edworthy Park in Calgary | type = [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]] | location = [[:en:Calgary, Alberta|Calgary, Alberta]], Canada | coordinates = {{coord|51|03|41|N|114|09|23|W|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|1.27|km2|abbr=on|2}} | operator = [[:en:Calgary|City of Calgary]] | open = All year }} {{Infobox park | name = Edworthy Park | image = Calgary-Edworthy Park.JPG | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = Bow River seen from Edworthy Park | map = Canada Calgary | map_width = 192 | map_alt = | map_caption = Location of Edworthy Park in Calgary | type = [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]] | location = [[:en:Calgary, Alberta|Calgary, Alberta]], Canada | coordinates = {{coord|51|03|41|N|114|09|23|W|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|1.27|km2|abbr=on|2}} | operator = [[:en:Calgary|City of Calgary]] | open = All year }} {{clear}} == Map display methods == Any image of a map showing the location of the park can be used. === Display a marker on a map using a template and geographic coordinates === A marker can be superimposed on a map using one of a set of special map templates. To display a marker, the geographic coordinates must be specified using the {{tl|Coord}} template inside the {{para|coordinates}} parameter. See the documentation for {{tl|Location map}}. The parameters for this template map to a subset of the parameters used by {{tlf|Location map}}. A map template can be found using these sources: :[[:en:Template:Location map/List|List of templates]] – Many of the listed items are redirects and a few templates may not function as expected. :[[:Category:Location map templates]] - templates sorted by category. :[[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Location map/Info]] – a search that might help. :[[Special:PrefixIndex/Module:Location map/data/]] – another search that might help. :[[Special:Prefixindex/Template:Location map]] – another search that might help. All of the names begin with the words "Location map" followed by the area covered. The value you need to specify is the area name. The map template for Canada is [[Module:Location map/data/Canada|Location map/data/Canada]]. In this case specify {{para|map|Canada}}. {{Infobox park| | name = Four Corners, Canada | map = Canada | map_caption = Example using geographic coordinates | coordinates = {{coord|60|N|102|W|display=inline }} }} {{Infobox park| | name = Four Corners, Canada | map = Canada | map_caption = Example using geographic coordinates | coordinates = {{coord|60|N|102|W|display=inline }} }} By default, {{tl|Coord}} displays in the infobox only in the page title. Parameter {{para|display|inline,title}} can be added to make the coordinates display at the top of the page as well. {{clear}} === Mapframe parameters === {{Infobox mapframe/doc/parameters |mapframe={{kbd|no}} if a pushpin map or map image is specified, {{kbd|yes}} otherwise |mapframe-frame-width=250 |mapframe-marker=park }} == Template embedding == This template can be embedding in another infobox template by adding the code |child=yes. To embed another template in this one use |embedded={{Infobox .... == Microformat == The articles created using this template include an hCard microformat. For more information read [[:Template:UF-hcard-place|this]]. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}}

Use {{URL}}." }, "embedded": { "label": "Embedded", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Used to embed another template in this one." }, "child": { "label": "Child", "type": "string", "required": false, "description": "Used to embed this template in another." } }, "format": "block", "paramOrder": [ "name", "alt_name", "native_name", "native_name_lang", "image", "image_size", "image_alt", "image_caption", "map", "map_image", "map_width", "map_alt", "map_caption", "label", "label_position", "relief", "mark", "type", "location", "motto", "nearest_city", "nearest_town", "grid_ref_UK", "grid_ref_UK_note", "grid_ref_Ireland", "grid_ref_Ireland_note", "coordinates", "coords_ref", "area", "elevation", "authorized", "created", "established", "designated", "opened", "opening", "closed", "founder", "designer", "etymology", "owner", "administrator", "manager", "operator", "visitation_num", "visitation_year", "visitation_ref", "open", "status", "awards", "camp_sites", "hiking_trails", "paths", "terrain", "habitat", "water", "plants", "vegetation", "species", "collections", "designation", "disturbance", "budget", "parking", "publictransit", "transport", "free_label", "free_data", "other_info", "facilities", "website", "embedded", "child" ] }
{{collapse bottom}} == Tracking categories == * {{clc|Pages using infobox park with unknown parameters}} ==See also== * {{tl|Infobox street}} * {{tl|Infobox urban feature}} {{sandbox other|| [[Category:Place infobox templates|Park]] [[Category:Protected areas templates|Park infobox]] [[Category:Templates with coordinates fields]] [[Category:Embeddable templates]] [[Category:Templates that add a tracking category]] }}

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} {{mbox | type = notice | text = If the park is a natural protected area [[IUCN protected area categories|listed by IUCN]], then editors should use {{tl|Infobox protected area}}. }} {{Lua|Module:Infobox|Module:InfoboxImage|Module:Coordinates|Module:Check for unknown parameters|Module:Infobox mapframe}} This Infobox template can be used in articles about parks, gardens and nature reserves. ==Usage== {{Parameter names example |_template=Infobox park | name | alt_name | native_name | native_name_lang | image | image_size | image_alt | image_caption | map_image | map_alt | map_width | map_caption | type | motto | location | nearest_city = {{br list |{{{nearest_city}}} |''or'' {{{nearest_town}}} }} | grid_ref_UK | grid_ref_UK_note | grid_ref_Ireland | grid_ref_Ireland_note | coordinates | coords_ref | area | elevation | authorized = {{br list |{{{authorized}}} |''or'' {{{created}}} |''or'' {{{established}}} |''or'' {{{designated}}} |''or'' {{{opened}}} |''or'' {{{opening}}} }} | closed | founder | designer | etymology | owner | administrator = {{br list |{{{administrator}}} |''or'' {{{manager}}} |''or'' {{{operator}}} }} | visitation_num | visitation_year | visitation_ref | open | status | awards | camp_sites | hiking_trails = {{br list |{{{hiking_trails}}} |''or'' {{{paths}}} }} | terrain = {{br list |{{{terrain}}} |''or'' {{{habitat}}} }} | water | plants = {{br list |{{{plants}}} |''or'' {{{vegetation}}} }} | species | collections | designation | disturbance | budget | parking | publictransit = {{br list |{{{publictransit}}} |''or'' {{{transport}}} }} | free_label | free_data | other_info = {{br list |{{{other_info}}} |''or'' {{{facilities}}} }} | website | embedded }} This template provides many options. A very functional infobox can be created using the most commonly used parameters below. {| class="wikitable" ! Common parameters ! All parameters |- style="vertical-align:top;" | {{Infobox park | name = | image = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | map = | map_width = | type = | location = | nearest_city = | coordinates = | area = | created = | operator = | visitation_num = | status = | designation = | open = }} | {{Infobox park | name = | alt_name = | native_name = | native_name_lang = | image = | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = | qid = | map = | map_alt = | map_width = | mapframe-zoom = | mapframe-width = | mapframe-height = | mapframe-marker = | mapframe-marker-color = | mapframe-lat = | mapframe-long = | map_caption = | relief = | label = | label_position = | mark = | mark_width = | type = | motto = | location = | nearest_city = | nearest_town = | grid_ref_UK = | grid_ref_UK_note = | grid_ref_Ireland = | grid_ref_Ireland_note = | coordinates = | coords_ref = | area = | elevation = | authorized = | created = | established = | designated = | opened = | opening = | closed = | founder = | designer = | etymology = | owner = | administrator = | manager = | operator = | visitation_num = | visitation_year = | visitation_ref = | open = | status = | awards = | camp_sites = | hiking_trails = | paths = | terrain = | habitat = | water = | plants = | vegetation = | species = | collections = | designation = | disturbance = | budget = | parking = | publictransit = | transport = | free_label = | free_data = | other_info = | facilities = | website = | embedded = | child = }} |} {{clear}} ==Parameters== ===Descriptions=== This table describes all parameters which can be used in build park infobox. Only the name parameter must be assigned a value. {| class="wikitable" style="width: 97%;" ! style="width: 14%" | Field name || Description |- | name || Required. The name of the park. It will be displayed at the top of the infobox. In most cases this should be the same as the article name less any disambiguation. For example, if the article title is [[Hyde Park, London]] then name=Hyde Park. |- | alt_name || If there is a common English name for the park use it for the name parameter. This parameter can be used to display the full name if different from name or for an alternate English name if it is commonly used. If you would like to italicize the text use wiki markup. |- | native_name || name in local language. If more than one, separate using {{tl|plainlist}}. |- | native_name_lang || ISO 639-2 code e.g. "fr" for French. If more than one, use {{tl|lang}} instead. |- | image
photo || The name of an image file to be displayed. No special formatting is needed. |- | image_size
photo_width || Can be used to change the display width of the image. The default width is 250 [[:en:Pixel|Pixel]]s and maximum is 325 pixels. Images with a horizontal orientation (landscape mode) will generally display well at the default setting. An image with vertical orientation (portrait mode) may need to be adjusted to 180 pixels or less. For example, image_size=200 and not image_size=200px. This template allows image_size=frameless. See [[#Photo display parameters|Photo display parameters]] below. |- | image_alt
photo_alt || Alternative text for the image, for visually impaired readers. See [[WP:ALT]]. |- | image_caption
photo_caption || The caption that will appear below the image if one is required. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Map related parameters |- | map || The name of the [[Template:location map|location map]] to be displayed. See [[#Map display methods|Map display methods]] below. To use a static image, use {{para|map_image}} |- | map_image || The file name of a static map image to be displayed. To use a [[Template:location map|location map]], use {{para|map}}. |- | map_width || Can change the display width the map. The default width is 250 pixels and maximum is 272 pixels, but usually the map can be smaller. For example, map_width=200 and not map_width=200px. |- | map_alt || Alt text for the map. See [[WP:ALT]]. |- | map_caption || The caption that appears below the map if one is required. |- | label || A text message that will be displayed next to the mark. Works with label_position below. Seldom used. |- | label_position || Specifies the position of a label with respect to the mark. This is not functional when using the pixel coordinates method for map display. Valid values are left, right, top and bottom. See label above. |- | relief || Selects a relief map when assigned any value. This is not functional when using the pixel coordinates method for map display. See [[#Map display methods|Map display methods]]. |- | mark || The image used for the mark on a map. The default is [[:File:Red pog.svg|Red pog.svg]]. See [[Template:Location map/marks|Location map/marks]] for other images. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Type, Location, Motto, Nearest city |- | type || |- | location || The location of the park. Don't be too precise. County, state and country are good in the USA. If the park is within a city specify the city, state and country. If the park is in multiple counties just list the state and country. For areas in other countries adjust accordingly. |- | motto || |- | nearest_city
nearest_town || Recommended if the area is not within a city or town. It could be a city with a major airport or a large gateway town where supplies and lodging are available. Use the most appropriate parameter. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Coordinates-related parameters |- | grid_ref_UK || If the park is in Great Britain, the British grid reference. For parks outside of Great Britain, this field is not applicable and therefore should be removed if it is present. |- | grid_ref_UK_note || If grid_ref_UK is used, this will add a note (e.g., for a reference) immediately after. |- | grid_ref_Ireland || If the park is in Ireland (whether Northern Ireland or the Republic), the Irish grid reference. For parks outside Ireland, this field is not applicable and therefore should be removed if it is present. |- | grid_ref_UK_Ireland || If grid_ref_Ireland is used, this will add a note (e.g., for a reference) immediately after. |- | coordinates || For the {{tl|coord}} template. The parameters {{para|format|dms}} and {{para|display|inline,title}} are recommended. Its coordinates can be used with the location map. (Unless a value for type: is provided, the template will automatically use type:landmark. See the {{tl|Coord}} page for more info.) |- | coords_ref || Strongly recommended. Specify a citation for the coordinates using {{nowrap| ...}} tags. |- | colspan="2" style="text-align: center; font-weight: bold;" | Other parameters |- | area || Area of the protected park. Usually in acres or square miles for US locations and hectares or square kilometres elsewhere. The {{tl|convert}} template should be used. Very small areas might be specified in square feet, square yards or square metres. |- | elevation || Elevation of the park if it is noteworthy. The {{tl|convert}} template should be used. |- | authorized
created
established
designated
opened
opening || The date the park was created. See [[#Alternate parameters|below]]. Use {{tl|start date}}. For example, for Yosemite National Park, use {{start date|1890|10|1}}. |- | closed || The date of closure or disestablishment, if applicable. |- | founder || The person who founded the park or garden. |- | designer || The person who designed the park or garden. |- | etymology || The [[:en:Etymology|Etymology]] of parks name. Should be very brief or only included in the text of the article. |- | owner || |- | administrator
manager
operator || The agency or organization which controls or owns the park. See [[#Alternate parameters|below]]. |- | visitation_num || The number of visitors in a recent year if known. |- | visitation_year || The year during which the number of visitors was counted. |- | visitation_ref || Used with the visitation parameters above. Highly recommended. Specify the a citation for the visitation data using {{nowrap| ...}} tags. |- | open || The hours, days, or months that the park is open. |- | status || The status of the park. ''e.g.'' "Closed for restoration", or "Closed due to budgetary considerations." Sometimes used as an alternative to open. ''e.g.'' "Open all year." |- | awards || Any awards given to the park; for example, [[Green Flag Award]] in the UK. |- | camp_sites || |- | hiking_trails
paths || |- | terrain
habitat || Type(s) of terrain or habitat(s). |- | water || |- | plants
vegetation || Number of individual plants grown. |- | species || Number of species grown. |- | collections || Notable plant collections. |- | designation || The legal protection offered to the park. |- | disturbance || Threats to the park, e.g. logging, urban development. |- | budget || Owner/ operator's planned annual expenditure. |- | parking || Information on the park's parking facilities (e.g. number of spaces or lots). |- | publictransit
transport || The nearest public transport stop. |- | free_label || Customisable label. |- | free_data || Data field used with free_label. |- | other_info
facilities || |- | website || Website. Use {{tl|URL}}. |- | embedded || Used to embed another template in this one. See [[#Template embedding|below]]. |- | child || Used to embed this template in another. See [[#Template embedding|below]]. |} ===Image display parameters=== The parameters image_size or photo_width allow several options: {| class="wikitable" style="width: 97%;" ! Option || Description |- | image_size=
photo_width= || If no value is assigned, the image will display with a width of 250 pixels. |- | image_size=
photo_width= || Where n is any numeric value, the image will display with a width of n pixels. The maximum width is 325 pixels. |- | image_size=frameless
photo_width=frameless || The image will display with a default width of 220 pixels, however, if a user is logged in, they can change this value [[Special:Preferences#mw-prefsection-rendering|here]]. If this option is used, the upright parameter is made available. For example, |image_size=frameless|upright=1.2 will cause the image to display with a width of (220 * 1.2) or 264 pixels. More information about this parameter can be found [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Plain picture sizes|here]]. |- | image_size=upright
photo_width=upright || The image will display with a default width of 170px. This is equivalent to {{nowrap|[[File:Example.jpg|frameless|upright]]}} using wiki image syntax. More information about the upright option can be found [[Wikipedia:Picture tutorial#Upright images|here]]. |} === Alternate parameters === A few cells allow alternate parameter names which can be used to generate an appropriate label. Editors should probably not be overly concerned with using the correct label unless using the wrong label would be a blatant error. Nearest city or town: : nearest_city → Nearest city : nearest_town → Nearest town To display the date the park was ''created'' use the most appropriate parameter below: : authorized → Authorized : created → Created : designated → Designated : established → Established : opened → Opened : opening → Opening To display the name of the entity which ''manages'' the park use the most appropriate parameter below: : administrator → Administered by : manager → Managed by : operator → Operated by Hiking trails or paths: : hiking_trails → Hiking trails : paths → Paths Terrain or habitat: : terrain → Terrain : habitat → Habitats Plants or vegetation: : plants → Plants : vegetation → Vegetation Public transit access or connecting transport: : publictransit → Public transit access : transport → Connecting transport Other information or facilities: : other_info → Other information : facilities → Facilities ==Examples== {{Infobox park|qid=Q7683479 | name = Tank Hill Park | alt_name = | image = Tank Hill, San Francisco.jpg | image_size = 256 | image_alt = | image_caption = Tank Hill from below | type = Municipal Park and Natural Area | location = [[:en:San Francisco, California|San Francisco, California]], U.S. | coordinates = {{coord|37|45|36|N|122|26|51|W|region:US-CA_source:gnis|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|2.87|acre|2}} | created = {{start date|1977}} | operator = San Francisco Recreation and Parks }} {{Infobox park | name = Tank Hill Park | alt_name = | image = Tank Hill, San Francisco.jpg | image_size = 256 | image_alt = | image_caption = Tank Hill from below | type = Municipal Park and Natural Area | location = [[San Francisco]], [[California]] | coordinates = {{coord|37|45|36|N|122|26|51|W|region:US-CA_source:gnis|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|2.87|acre|2}} | created = {{start date|1977}} | operator = San Francisco Recreation and Parks }} {{clear}} {{Infobox park | name = Edworthy Park | image = Calgary-Edworthy Park.JPG | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = Bow River seen from Edworthy Park | map = Canada Calgary | map_width = 192 | map_alt = | map_caption = Location of Edworthy Park in Calgary | type = [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]] | location = [[:en:Calgary, Alberta|Calgary, Alberta]], Canada | coordinates = {{coord|51|03|41|N|114|09|23|W|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|1.27|km2|abbr=on|2}} | operator = [[:en:Calgary|City of Calgary]] | open = All year }} {{Infobox park | name = Edworthy Park | image = Calgary-Edworthy Park.JPG | image_size = | image_alt = | image_caption = Bow River seen from Edworthy Park | map = Canada Calgary | map_width = 192 | map_alt = | map_caption = Location of Edworthy Park in Calgary | type = [[:en:Urban park|Urban park]] | location = [[:en:Calgary, Alberta|Calgary, Alberta]], Canada | coordinates = {{coord|51|03|41|N|114|09|23|W|display=inline}} | area = {{convert|1.27|km2|abbr=on|2}} | operator = [[:en:Calgary|City of Calgary]] | open = All year }} {{clear}} == Map display methods == Any image of a map showing the location of the park can be used. === Display a marker on a map using a template and geographic coordinates === A marker can be superimposed on a map using one of a set of special map templates. To display a marker, the geographic coordinates must be specified using the {{tl|Coord}} template inside the {{para|coordinates}} parameter. See the documentation for {{tl|Location map}}. The parameters for this template map to a subset of the parameters used by {{tlf|Location map}}. A map template can be found using these sources: :[[:en:Template:Location map/List|List of templates]] – Many of the listed items are redirects and a few templates may not function as expected. :[[:Category:Location map templates]] - templates sorted by category. :[[Special:WhatLinksHere/Template:Location map/Info]] – a search that might help. :[[Special:PrefixIndex/Module:Location map/data/]] – another search that might help. :[[Special:Prefixindex/Template:Location map]] – another search that might help. All of the names begin with the words "Location map" followed by the area covered. The value you need to specify is the area name. The map template for Canada is [[Module:Location map/data/Canada|Location map/data/Canada]]. In this case specify {{para|map|Canada}}. {{Infobox park| | name = Four Corners, Canada | map = Canada | map_caption = Example using geographic coordinates | coordinates = {{coord|60|N|102|W|display=inline }} }} {{Infobox park| | name = Four Corners, Canada | map = Canada | map_caption = Example using geographic coordinates | coordinates = {{coord|60|N|102|W|display=inline }} }} By default, {{tl|Coord}} displays in the infobox only in the page title. Parameter {{para|display|inline,title}} can be added to make the coordinates display at the top of the page as well. {{clear}} === Mapframe parameters === {{Infobox mapframe/doc/parameters |mapframe={{kbd|no}} if a pushpin map or map image is specified, {{kbd|yes}} otherwise |mapframe-frame-width=250 |mapframe-marker=park }} == Template embedding == This template can be embedding in another infobox template by adding the code |child=yes. To embed another template in this one use |embedded={{Infobox .... == Microformat == The articles created using this template include an hCard microformat. For more information read [[:Template:UF-hcard-place|this]]. == TemplateData == {{collapse top|[[Wikipedia:TemplateData|TemplateData]] documentation used by [[Wikipedia:VisualEditor|VisualEditor]] and other tools}} {{TemplateData header|noheader=1}}
